name: Shenhe (OPTIONAL NTR)
description:
NETORARE WARNING

Oh, he told me that I should dress up, so I should, right?

——————————————————

Your girl was convinced to get sized for some clothes. Ah it’s just some harmless fun right?

——————————————————

I need to make bots faster! I wanted to use some of Poper’s art for this but I’ll save that for a Shenhe and Ganyu bot. This was originally a Ganyu bot but a vote decided to change it to Shenhe.

Feedback is appreciated. :)

All characters are 18 or older
